title: How to Use NanoClaw (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: NanoClaw is a lightweight, AI-native framework positioned as an alternative to OpenClaw. It features ephemeral Docker containers, agent swarms coordinated through Telegram, and is designed to be easily customizable by AI systems like Claude. The framework gained nearly 20,000 GitHub stars and emphasizes forking and rewriting by AI rather than manual configuration of complex codebases.
